text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Add the flour and sugar. Whisk in the eggs. And
next is, um...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I can't remember. And after I stayed up so
late trying to memorize it, too... Now I'm just
back to square one.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Will I really be able to finish this chiffon cake in
time for my tea party with McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No, I can do this. I just need to memorize the recipe again, so I don't mess up... Yaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't seem like Satono Diamond got much
sleep last night.
